title: lagenophora billardierei var. media
intro: Lagenophora billardierei var. media, also known as the bush daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lagenophora billardierei var. media include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
